allow: Bash(git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/styles/global.css public/styles/global.css README.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Revert to dark color scheme; document palette in README

Restore original colors \(#0a0a0a bg, warm white text, gold accent\).
Replace boilerplate README with project-specific docs including
full color token table and deployment instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Rename Work→Case Files and Writing→Operating Playbooks

- Rename page directories: /work → /case-files, /writing → /operating-playbooks
- Update all nav labels, page titles, h1s, back-links, and hrefs
- Fix Series 2 duplicate on homepage \(unflag Change Injection from featured\)
- Fix series sort order to S1 → S2 → S3 on both homepage and playbooks page
- Remove logo from nav, add plain Home link; logo stays on homepage hero only
- Homepage hero: two-column layout with logo on the right

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && npx vercel --prod 2>&1)

Add Vercel Analytics

Install @vercel/analytics and inject <Analytics /> into both

EOF
